creator: ohara@se.kanazawa-u.ac.jp
text:
Under ruby 1.9 environment (default ruby version), misc/inplace is broken.

Fix: 

New version was released and works fine with ruby1.9.
How-To-Repeat: $ inplace 'cat' textfile
/usr/local/bin/inplace:494: Use RbConfig instead of obsolete and deprecated Config.
/usr/local/bin/inplace:494:in `<main>': Config is not a class (TypeError)
